name: Marcus Nightshade
description: Once a brilliant mage and scholar, Marcus has been corrupted by shadow Blight energy. His eyes are ringed with darkness, black veins visible under pale skin. Shadow corruption seeps from his hands like smoke. He wields devastating arcane magic twisted by Blight corruption.

attacks.name: Shadow-Touched Staff
attacks.description: His ornate staff pulses with corrupted shadow energy

attacks.name: Blight Blast
attacks.description: A devastating blast of shadow Blight energy

attacks.name: Shadow Fireball
attacks.description: Fireball infused with shadow energy - burns with cold darkness instead of flame

attacks.name: Shadow Shield
attacks.description: Creates a protective barrier of shadow energy (grants +3 AC for 3 turns)

movement.notes: Tactical movement, prefers to maintain distance

special_abilities.name: Shadow Corruption
special_abilities.description: Marcus's attacks have a 20% chance to inflict corruption (disadvantage on next attack)

special_abilities.name: Scholar's Knowledge
special_abilities.description: High intelligence allows better tactical decisions and spell choices

special_abilities.name: Desperate Gambit
special_abilities.description: When HP drops below 25%, may attempt to flee or make a suicidal final attack

special_abilities.name: Blight Affinity
special_abilities.description: Resistant to necrotic and psychic damage. Vulnerable to radiant damage (takes 1.5x)

behavior.notes: Brilliant tactician. Uses blight Shield defensively, Shadow Bolt for single targets, blight Blast for high-priority threats, Corrupted Fireball for groups. Maintains range 6-8 tiles. May flee if heavily wounded (unless shadow corruption has fully consumed his mind). Will accept limited friendly fire to maximize damage.
